title: PUBLISH_KEY_PACKAGE stores unbounded blob; no per-package size cap below 1 MiB WS limit
description: PUBLISH_KEY_PACKAGE validates device_id format but not params.data size. An authenticated client can store up to 1 MiB per (pub_id, device_id) in the key_packages table. With max_connections=5 and no per-user device limit, a client can fill the DB with large blobs. A reasonable MLS key package is <10 KB; add a MAX_KEY_PACKAGE_BYTES check (e.g. 64 KB) before save_key_package.
